summary: V56.0 Vitality Overlay testing complete. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend features verified: Cinematic Walkthrough button with 5 journey options, Oracle 3D Tarot cards with preserve-3d styling and hover effects, ProgressionToast container mounted, __workAccrue function available. VitalityBar component exists in SpatialRoom header but requires authenticated user context to render.

integration_issues.issue: VitalityBar component is correctly placed in SpatialRoom header (line 530) but only renders when user is authenticated AND RPG character data is fetched. Component returns null if !stats || !user (line 70). This is expected behavior but may need UX consideration for unauthenticated users.

critical_code_review_comments: VitalityBar.js line 70: Component returns null for unauthenticated users - this is correct behavior but consider showing a placeholder or login prompt for better UX
Oracle.js: 3D Tarot cards working correctly with preserve-3d, perspective:1000px, and matrix3d transforms for fan spread
CinematicWalkthrough.js: All 5 journey options (wellness, divination, nature, sovereign, full) present and accessible
ProgressionToast.js: Container mounted in DOM, ready to receive vitality-pulse events
useWorkAccrual.js: __workAccrue function exposed globally and callable
context_for_next_testing_agent: V56.0 Vitality Overlay features all working. Backend milestones API (GET /api/rpg/milestones, POST /api/rpg/milestones/claim), gain-xp endpoint, and work-submit endpoint all functional. Frontend: Cinematic Walkthrough accessible from Sovereign Hub, Oracle Tarot cards render with 3D effects after ~9s API response, ProgressionToast container mounted, VitalityBar requires auth to display. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_v56_vitality_overlay.py

backend.GET /api/rpg/milestones: PASS - Returns milestone list with progress tracking, all expected milestone definitions present
backend.POST /api/rpg/milestones/claim: PASS - Validates milestone_id, returns 404 for invalid milestone
backend.POST /api/rpg/character/gain-xp: PASS - Returns xp_gained, total_xp, level, supports level-up data
backend.POST /api/transmuter/work-submit: PASS - Returns earned dust and dust_balance for various modules
backend.GET /api/rpg/character: PASS - Returns full character data including level, xp_current, xp_next, xp_total

frontend.Cinematic Walkthrough button: PASS - Found on Sovereign Hub, opens picker with 5 journey options
frontend.Oracle 3D orbital animation: PASS - Empty state shows 'The cards await' with sparkle animation
frontend.Oracle Tarot Draw Cards: PASS - Button works, 4 cards rendered after ~9s with 3D fan spread
frontend.Oracle 3D card styling: PASS - preserve-3d, perspective:1000px, matrix3d transforms, hover lift effect
frontend.VitalityBar in SpatialRoom: CONDITIONAL - Component exists but requires authenticated user to render
frontend.ProgressionToast container: PASS - Mounted in DOM with data-testid='progression-toast-container'
frontend.__workAccrue function: PASS - Available on window object, callable
